query:
-- Reset the conversation session stage so it will process the next inbound reply
UPDATE conversation_sessions
SET stage = 'QUALITY_RATING_REQUESTED',
    messageHistory = '[{"role":"assistant","content":"Hi Jane! 🏠 How was your cleaning today? Please rate us 1–5 ⭐ (just reply with a number). Your feedback helps us improve!","ts":1773984967990}]',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE leadPhone = '+13029816191' AND id = 990001;

-- Reset the rating SMS row back to approved so Send Now works
UPDATE rating_sms_pending
SET status = 'approved', sentAt = NULL
WHERE cleanerJobId = 18;

-- Reset the job rating so we can see it update fresh
UPDATE cleaner_jobs
SET customerRating = NULL, missedSomething = NULL, flagged = 0,
    ratingAdjustment = '0', streakBonus = '0', finalPay = basePay
WHERE id = 18;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute 
-- Reset the conversation session stage so it will process the next inbound reply
UPDATE conversation_sessions
SET stage = 'QUALITY_RATING_REQUESTED',
    messageHistory = '[{"role":"assistant","content":"Hi Jane! 🏠 How was your cleaning today? Please rate us 1–5 ⭐ (just reply with a number). Your feedback helps us improve!","ts":1773984967990}]',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE leadPhone = '+13029816191' AND id = 990001;

-- Reset the rating SMS row back to approved so Send Now works
UPDATE rating_sms_pending
SET status = 'approved', sentAt = NULL
WHERE cleanerJobId = 18;

-- Reset the job rating so we can see it update fresh
UPDATE cleaner_jobs
SET customerRating = NULL, missedSomething = NULL, flagged = 0,
    ratingAdjustment = '0', streakBonus = '0', finalPay = basePay
WHERE id = 18;
